import React from 'react'; const DataTable = React.memo(({ data, onEdit, onDelete }) => (
{data.map((row) => ( ))}
ID Name Email Role Status Actions
{row.id} {row.name} {row.email} {row.role} {row.status}
)); export default DataTable;
